full_text:
Tang Sheng е”җзӣӣ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tang Sheng (е”җзӣӣ). Discussed ways to expand Wu power with Zhongli Xun. Tang Sheng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
